snippet.title: Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy Gameplay Trailer
snippet.description:
Apex Legends: Legacy brings a new form of competition, Arenas. Drop into a new action-packed 3v3 game mode. Sharpen your skills in new, bespoke maps like Party Crasher and Phase Runner. It‚Äôs just your squad and their squad, so hiding isn‚Äôt an option.

We‚Äôd wish you luck, but in Arenas, there isn‚Äôt any. This is a true test of skill.

Valkyrie, daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper, is also joining the Games. Take advantage of her jetpack to own the sky and rain missiles down on your foes. Master the new high-precision Bocek Bow to skewer your opponents and drop into an Olympus that‚Äôs been mysteriously transformed. Plus grab the latest Battle Pass and prove yourself in Ranked.

There‚Äôs nowhere to hide this season, Legends. Ready to find out if you‚Äôre predator or prey? Discover your true nature when Apex Legends: Legacy launches May 4!

nl-NL.title: Apex Legends ‚Äì Gameplay-trailer Legacy
nl-NL.description:
Bereid je voor om verder te gaan dan battle royale. Stem morgen om 17:00 CET af om de gameplay-trailer van Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy te bekijken en alles te weten te komen over deze nieuwe manier van spelen.
Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy introduceert een nieuwe vorm van competitie: Arenas. Stort je in een nieuwe 3v3-spelmodus boordevol actie. Scherp je vaardigheden aan op nieuwe, aangepaste maps, zoals Party Crasher en Phase Runner. Alles draait om jouw squad en hun squad, dus jezelf verstoppen is geen optie.

Stel je geluk op de proef, maar besef: geluk bestaat niet in Arenas. Hier wordt getest hoe goed je echt bent.

Valkyrie, de dochter van de beruchte Titan Pilot Viper, doet ook mee aan de Games. Profiteer van haar jetpack om in de lucht te heersen en het raketten te laten regenen op de tegenstander. Leer alles over de nieuwe zeer nauwkeurige Bocek Bow om je tegenstanders te slim af te zijn en stort je in een Olympus dat een mysterieuze transformatie heeft ondergaan. Download daarnaast de nieuwste Battle Pass en bewijs jezelf in Ranked.

Jullie kunnen je dit seizoen nergens verstoppen, Legends. Wil je weten of je roofdier of prooi bent? Ontdek je ware aard als Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy op 4 mei wordt uitgebracht!

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de PlayStation¬Æ4, PlayStation¬Æ5, Xbox One, Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch en pc via Origin en Steam.

Meer informatie over Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308
 
Bekijk ons YouTube-kanaal: http://x.ea.com/56710.
Volg ons op Twitter: https://twitter.com/playapex.
Volg ons op Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/playapex/.

snippet.title: Perseverance Rover's Mastcam-Z Captures Ingenuity's Third Flight
snippet.description:
NASA‚Äôs Ingenuity Mars Helicopter takes off and lands in this video captured on April 25, 2021, by Mastcam-Z, an imager aboard NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Mars rover. As expected, the helicopter flew out of its field of vision while completing a flight plan that took it 164 feet (50 meters) downrange of the landing spot. Keep watching, the helicopter will return to stick the landing. Top speed for today's flight was about 2 meters per second, or about 4.5 miles-per-hour.

The Ingenuity Mars Helicopter was built by JPL, which also manages this technology demonstration project for NASA Headquarters. It is supported by NASA‚Äôs Science Mission Directorate, Aeronautics Research Mission Directorate, and Space Technology Mission Directorate. NASA‚Äôs Ames Research Center and Langley Research Center provided significant flight performance analysis and technical assistance during Ingenuity‚Äôs development.

A key objective for Perseverance‚Äôs mission on Mars is astrobiology, including the search for signs of ancient microbial life. The rover will characterize the planet‚Äôs geology and past climate, pave the way for human exploration of the Red Planet, and be the first mission to collect and cache Martian rock and regolith (broken rock and dust). 

Subsequent NASA missions, in cooperation with ESA (European Space Agency), would send spacecraft to Mars to collect these sealed samples from the surface and return them to Earth for in-depth analysis.

The Mars 2020 Perseverance mission is part of NASA‚Äôs Moon to Mars exploration approach, which includes Artemis missions to the Moon that will help prepare for human exploration of the Red Planet.

JPL, which is managed for NASA by Caltech in Pasadena, California, built and manages operations of the Perseverance rover.

For more about Perseverance:
-mars.nasa.gov/mars2020/
-nasa.gov/perseverance

Credit: NASA/JPL-Caltech/ASU/MSSS

Alors que l‚ÄôOM est men√© au score en 1√®re mi-temps, c‚Äôest Dimitri Payet qui sonne la r√©volte dans le camp olympien en √©galisant ! Arek Milik permet coup sur coup aux Marseillais de prendre l‚Äôavantage, juste avant le retour aux vestiaires. Les r√©mois rapidement r√©duits √Ý 10 en seconde mi-temps, nos Olympiens prennent le match √Ý leur compte en faisant le break : doubl√© de Payet, bien servi par Valentin Rongier qui effectuait son grand retour sous le maillot bleu et blanc ! Une victoire importante pour l‚ÄôOM qui reste au contact de Lens dans la course √Ý l‚ÄôEurope.

en.title: Reims 1-3 OM l Behind the scenes üî•
en.description:
3 goals against Reims & 5 victories in 7 games for Jorge Sampaoli !

Our Olympiens traveled to Auguste-Delaune for the 34th matchday of Ligue 1 Uber Eats season!  The Argentine coach returned his now traditional 5-3-2, lining up Nagatomo on the left side!  While OM fell behind in the 1st half, it was Dimitri Payet who led the Olympien comeback by equalizing!  Arek Milik gave the Marseillais a quick lead, just before the halftime trip to the locker room.  Reims was quickly reduced to 10 men in the second half and our Olympiens took the game full-on: a brace by from Payet, assisted by Valentin Rongier and an important victory for OM ‚Äî who remain within reach in the race for Europe.

'The Sprint Is On', a new episode of Match Day presented by @Hotels.com

snippet.title: Steven Spielberg's "West Side Story" | Official Teaser | 20th Century Studios
snippet.description:
Directed by Academy Award¬Æ winner Steven Spielberg, from a screenplay by Pulitzer Prize and Tony Award¬Æ winner Tony Kushner, ‚ÄúWest Side Story‚Äù tells the classic tale of fierce rivalries and young love in 1957 New York City. This reimagining of the beloved musical stars Ansel Elgort (Tony); Rachel Zegler (Mar√≠a); Ariana DeBose (Anita); David Alvarez (Bernardo); Mike Faist (Riff); Josh Andr√©s Rivera (Chino); Ana Isabelle (Rosal√≠a); Corey Stoll (Lieutenant Schrank); Brian d‚ÄôArcy James (Officer Krupke); and Rita Moreno (as Valentina, who owns the corner store in which Tony works). Moreno ‚Äì one of only three artists to be honored with Academy¬Æ, Emmy¬Æ, GRAMMY¬Æ, Tony¬Æ and Peabody Awards ‚Äì also serves as one of the film‚Äôs executive producers.
 
Bringing together the best of both Broadway and Hollywood, the film‚Äôs creative team includes Kushner, who also serves as an executive producer; Tony Award¬Æ winner Justin Peck, who choreographed the musical numbers in the film; renowned Los Angeles Philharmonic conductor and GRAMMY Award¬Æ winner Gustavo Dudamel, who helmed the recording of the iconic score; Academy Award¬Æ-nominated composer and conductor David Newman (‚ÄúAnastasia‚Äù), who arranged the score; Tony Award¬Æ-winning composer Jeanine Tesori (‚ÄúFun Home,‚Äù ‚ÄúThoroughly Modern Millie‚Äù), who supervised the cast on vocals; and Grammy¬Æ-nominated music supervisor Matt Sullivan (‚ÄúBeauty and the Beast,‚Äù ‚ÄúChicago‚Äù), who served as executive music producer for the film. The film is produced by Spielberg, Academy Award¬Æ-nominated producer Kristie Macosko Krieger and Tony Award¬Æ-winning producer Kevin McCollum. ‚ÄúWest Side Story‚Äù has been adapted for the screen from the original 1957 Broadway show, with book by Arthur Laurents, music by Leonard Bernstein, lyrics by Stephen Sondheim and concept, direction and choreography by Jerome Robbins. 
 
From 20th Century Studios, The Walt Disney Company will release ‚ÄúWest Side Story‚Äù in U.S. theaters on December 10, 2021.

Instagram:   @westsidestorymovie
Facebook     @westsidestory2021

snippet.title: üî¥ Revoir l'amarrage de Thomas Pesquet en fran√ßais - SpaceX/NASA CREW-2
snippet.description:

Profitez d'un code de promo Spacefox sp√©cial pour ce lancement, soit 22% de r√©duction, valable du 22 avril au 25 avril, minuit : "CROUTOU"

Direct en soutien au magazine Espace & Exploration, meilleur magazine spatial francophone. Soutenez-les, abonnez-vous au mag : http://www.espace-exploration.com/fr/

Amarrage √Ý 11h10 heure fran√ßaise
Ouverture de la porte : 13h15
C√©r√©monie de bienvenue : 13h45
Charge utile : Crew Dragon (Astronautes Shane Kimbrough (US-NASA), Megan McArthur (US-NASA), Akihiko Hoshide (JAP-JAXA) et Thomas Pesquet, (FR-ESA))
Lanceur : Falcon 9 Block 5 (SpaceX). La capsule a d√©j√Ý servi sur le vol Demo-2.
Les 4 astronautes formeront l'exp√©dition 65 de l'ISS, avec un retour pr√©vu en octobre 2021.

snippet.title: Watch NASA's SpaceX Crew-2 Mission Arrive at the International Space Station
snippet.description: Tune in live as the Crew Dragon Endeavour spacecraft docks to the International Space Station with astronauts Shane Kimbrough, Megan McArthur of NASA, Thomas Pesquet of ESA (European Space Agency), and Akihiko Hoshide of JAXA (Japan Aerospace Exploration Agency) aboard. The four astronauts will begin a six-month science mission on the station. Docking is scheduled to occur at  5:10 a.m. EDT (9:10 a.m. UTC), Saturday, April 24,  followed by the hatch opening at 7:15 a.m. EDT (11:15 a.m. UTC), and a welcome ceremony at 7:45 a.m. EDT (11:45 a.m. UTC) Saturday, April 24.

Pourtant, il est loin d‚Äô√™tre le meilleur ! Aujourd‚Äôhui on va classer les dinosaures ! On a diff√©rentes cat√©gories,  et vous allez d√©couvrir qui est le plus fort dans chacune d‚Äôentre elles !
- Dinosaure le plus venimeux 
- Dinosaure le plus rapide
- Dinosaure le plus intelligent 
- Dinosaure le plus d√©fensif
- Dinosaure le plus petit

it.title: Apex Legends ‚Äì Origini ‚Äì Il trailer di lancio
it.description:
Preparati ad affrontare il pericolo a viso aperto, leggenda. Sarai predatore o preda? Scopri la tua vera natura nella Stagione 9 di Apex Legends, in arrivo il 4 maggio!

Valkyrie, figlia del noto pilota di Titan Viper, si unisce agli Apex Games. Sfrutta il suo jetpack per dominare la battaglia dall'alto e fai piovere missili sui nemici. Prova il nuovo arco compound Bocek per annientare gli avversari con la massima precisione e scopri la misteriosa trasformazione di Olympus. Infine, ottieni il nuovo pass battaglia e dai prova di te in Classificata.

Preparati ad andare oltre la battle royale. 

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ √® un gioco gratuito in stile battle royale in cui personaggi leggendari si sfidano per gloria, fama e ricchezza ai margini della Frontiera. Gioca gratis su Xbox One, PlayStation 4 e PC tramite Origin e Steam.

Scopri di pi√π su Origini, la Stagione 9 di Apex Legends: http://x.ea.com/68308
 
Dai un'occhiata al nostro canale YouTube: http://x.ea.com/56710.

en.title: Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy Launch Trailer
en.description:
There‚Äôs nowhere to hide this season, Legends. Ready to find out if you‚Äôre predator or prey? Discover your true nature when Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy launches May 4!

Valkyrie, daughter of notorious Titan Pilot Viper joins the Games. Take advantage of her jetpack to own the sky and rain missiles down on your foes. Master the new high-precision Bocek Bow to skewer your opponents and drop into an Olympus mysteriously transformed. Plus grab the latest Battle Pass and prove yourself in Ranked.

And get ready to go beyond battle royale. 

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is a free-to-play battle royale game where legendary characters battle for glory, fame, and fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Play for free now on Xbox One, PS4, and Origin and Steam for PC.

Learn more about Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308

nl-NL.title: Apex Legends ‚Äì Release-trailer Legacy
nl-NL.description:
Jullie kunnen je dit seizoen nergens verstoppen, Legends. Wil je weten of je een roofdier of prooi bent? Ontdek je ware aard als Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy op 4 mei wordt uitgebracht!

Valkyrie, de dochter van de beruchte Titan Pilot Viper, doet mee aan de Games. Profiteer van haar jetpack om in de lucht te heersen en het raketten te laten regenen op de tegenstander. Leer alles over de nieuwe zeer nauwkeurige Bocek Bow om je tegenstanders te slim af te zijn en stort je in een Olympus dat een mysterieuze transformatie heeft ondergaan. Download daarnaast de nieuwste Battle Pass en bewijs jezelf in Ranked.

En bereid je voor om verder te gaan dan battle royale. 

Apex Legends‚Ñ¢ is een free-to-play battle royale-spel waarin legendarische personages strijden om glorie, roem en fortuin aan de rand van de Frontier. Speel nu gratis op de Xbox One, PS4 en Origin en Steam voor de pc.

Meer informatie over Apex Legends ‚Äì Legacy: http://x.ea.com/68308
 
Bekijk ons YouTube-kanaal: http://x.ea.com/56710.

snippet.title: üö® Farming Simulator 22 is coming!

Get ready for new crops, new maps, new machines, new brands and more. Oh, and it‚Äôs getting snowy, too because we're adding seasonal cycles.
